applicationSchedules.title: Scheduled Tasks
applicationSchedules.description: Schedule tasks to run automatically at specified intervals.
applicationSchedules.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?
applicationSchedules.noTasksDesc: Create your first scheduled task to automate your workflows

forms.dialogDescriptionCreate: Create a schedule to run a task at a specific time or interval.
forms.dialogDescriptionEdit: Manage a schedule to run a task at a specific time or interval.
forms.fetchTooltip: Fetch: Will clone the repository and load the services
forms.cacheTooltip: Cache: If you previously deployed this compose, it will read the services from the last deployment/fetch from the repository
forms.taskNameDescription: A descriptive name for your scheduled task
forms.scheduleTooltipLine1: Cron expression format: minute hour day month weekday
forms.scheduleDescription: Choose a predefined schedule or enter a custom cron expression

presets.monthlyFirstMidnight: Every month on the 1st at midnight

forms.timezoneTooltip: Select a timezone for the schedule. If not specified, UTC will be used.
forms.timezoneDescription: Optional: Choose a timezone for the schedule execution time
forms.shellDescription: Choose the shell to execute your command
forms.commandDescription: The command to execute in your container
